book_visual_context: cinematic readable reference lighting, pulp adventure visual style, non-modern clothing, weathered natural materials

character_fallbacks.general: cinematic readable reference lighting, pulp adventure visual style, non-modern clothing, weathered natural materials; non-modern character styling; avoid contemporary portrait fashion unless explicitly described
character_fallbacks.earth_human: late-19th-century frontier adventure clothing, weathered natural fabrics, belts, boots, simple utilitarian garments, no modern suit or tie unless explicitly described
character_fallbacks.barsoom_humanoid: ancient alien-world planetary-romance wardrobe, harnesses, ornaments, tribal or gladiatorial elements, no modern Earth clothing
character_fallbacks.creature_or_primitive: feral or primitive non-modern appearance, rough natural materials if clothed, no tailored business attire
character_fallbacks.group_or_horde: coherent group visual language using non-modern tribal, frontier, or alien-world materials as appropriate

environment_fallbacks.general: cinematic readable reference lighting, pulp adventure visual style, non-modern clothing, weathered natural materials; clear cinematic location reference with explicit landmarks, scale, materials, lighting, and atmosphere
environment_fallbacks.desert_mountain: rugged desert mountain terrain, dry scrub, weathered rock, clear horizon, readable distance and scale
environment_fallbacks.cave_or_cliffside: visible cave mouth, cliffside rock face, rocky threshold, shadowed interior, weathered stone, readable entrance landmark
environment_fallbacks.interior: clear room or chamber layout, foreground midground background separation, pathways, anchor objects, visible scale
environment_fallbacks.wilderness: natural terrain with distinct foreground, midground, background, landmarks, lighting, and weather atmosphere

notes: Generated fallback text is descriptor-heavy by design and should not depend on image models knowing the source title.
Fallbacks are inferred visual guidance, not explicit canon unless supported by source artifacts.
